questions.q: What is the relationship between glycemic index and glycemic load, and how do they differ in their nutritional application?

Equal portions of all five food groups in any arrangement

questions.q: To minimize food waste, what should you do before purchasing perishable items at the grocery store?
choices: Buy in bulk to take advantage of discounts
Check what perishable foods you already have at home
Purchase items with the furthest expiration dates

questions.q: Which of the following health conditions has been associated with regular consumption of sugary beverages?
choices: Improved bone density and stronger teeth
Increased muscle mass and athletic performance
Type 2 diabetes, weight gain, and heart disease
